text: PM-USP (Pradhan Mantri Uchchatar Shiksha Protsahan) Purpose: Central sector scholarship for meritorious students from economically weaker families for higher education. Eligibility: Top 20th percentile in Class 12 board exams; enrolled in regular UG/PG courses; annual family income < ₹4.5 lakh. Benefits: ₹12,000/year for UG; ₹20,000/year for PG studies. Application: Online via National Scholarship Portal (https://scholarships.gov.in/).

PM-Vidyalaxmi Education Loan Scheme Purpose: Unified portal providing collateral-free, guarantor-free education loans to meritorious students in Quality Higher Education Institutions (QHEIs). Eligibility: Indian citizen with valid admission to a listed QHEI. Interest subvention for family income up to ₹8 lakh. Benefits: Apply to multiple banks via single form; interest subvention on loans up to ₹10 lakh. Application: Online via PM-Vidyalaxmi Portal (https://vidyalakshmi.co.in/).

PMSSS J&K (Prime Minister's Special Scholarship Scheme) Purpose: Support J&K and Ladakh students for higher education outside their UTs. Eligibility: Permanent resident of J&K/Ladakh; passed Class 12 from JKBOSE/CBSE in the UT; family income ≤ ₹8 lakh. Benefits: Academic fees covered and maintenance allowance of ₹1,00,000 per annum. Application: Online via AICTE PMSSS portal (https://aicte-jk-scholarship-gov.in/).

Post-Matric SC/ST/OBC Scholarships Purpose: Financial assistance for students continuing education after Class 10. Eligibility: Belong to SC/ST/OBC category; enrolled in recognized post-matric course (Class 11 to PhD); family income limits apply (e.g., ₹2.5 lakh for SC/ST). Benefits: Covers non-refundable fees, maintenance allowance, and study expenses. Application: Online via National Scholarship Portal (https://scholarships.gov.in/) or State portals.

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Social Justice / Tribal Affairs
